channel.title: AI News — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Daily AI news digest — curated headlines, summaries and trends

item.title: 30 ClawHub skills secretly turn AI agents into a crypto swarm
item.description: Thirty ClawHub skills are enabling AI agents to form a cryptocurrency mining swarm without user consent, raising concerns about unauthorized resource usage.

item.title: Hashicorp co-founder Mitchell Hashimoto says GitHub ‘no longer a place for serious work’
item.description: Hashicorp co-founder Mitchell Hashimoto criticized GitHub's frequent outages, stating it is no longer reliable for serious projects and plans to move his work elsewhere.

item.title: Future holiday horror: ‘A robot lost my luggage in Tokyo’
item.description: Haneda airport will test humanoid robots for luggage handling, potentially leading to humorous or frustrating travel experiences as robots may misplace luggage.

item.title: At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
item.description: During his trial, Elon Musk recounted a past friendship, reiterating stories previously shared in interviews and his biography, but now under oath.

item.title: spaceship-mcp 0.1.5
item.description: The MCP server for Spaceship AI has been updated to version 0.1.5, allowing management of agents from Claude Code and other clients.

item.title: snowloader 0.2.1
item.description: Version 0.2.1 of the snowloader has been released, providing a comprehensive ServiceNow data loader for AI/LLM pipelines, compatible with LangChain and LlamaIndex.

item.title: Google signs classified AI deal with the Pentagon for ‘any lawful government purpose’
item.description: Google has signed a classified AI deal with the Pentagon, allowing the Department of Defense to use its AI models without prior restrictions, following a trend among AI companies.

item.title: mcp-agent-review 0.1.1
item.description: The mcp-agent-review has been updated to version 0.1.1, providing an agentic code review server powered by OpenAI-compatible models.

item.title: aichatclient 3.6.6
item.description: Version 3.6.6 of the aichatclient has been released, offering a simple Python client for chatting with multiple AI models via OpenAI-compatible APIs.

item.title: ‘The cost of compute is far beyond the costs of the employees’: Nvidia executive says right now AI is more expensive than paying human workers
item.description: An Nvidia executive stated that current AI costs exceed those of human workers, despite significant capital investments in technology this year.

item.title: pyg-nightly 2.8.0.dev20260428
item.description: The pyg-nightly 2.8.0.dev20260428 release introduces updates to the Graph Neural Network Library for PyTorch, enhancing its capabilities for developers. This update is significant for those working with graph-based data in machine learning.

item.title: llama-index-readers-snowloader 0.2.0
item.description: The llama-index-readers-snowloader 0.2.0 offers new data reader capabilities for ServiceNow, allowing for both synchronous and asynchronous data handling. This is important for developers integrating ServiceNow data into applications.

item.title: msa-nim added to PyPI
item.description: The msa-nim tool has been added to PyPI, providing a command-line interface for generating A3M MSA alignments using NVIDIA's NIM MSA-Search. This tool is crucial for bioinformatics researchers working with sequence alignments.

item.title: langchain-snowloader 0.2.0
item.description: Langchain-snowloader 0.2.0 introduces document loaders for ServiceNow, enhancing data processing capabilities for incidents and other records. This is significant for developers utilizing LangChain for ServiceNow integration.

item.title: codexmem added to PyPI
item.description: Codexmem has been added to PyPI, providing a local SQLite memory MCP server for Codex. This addition supports developers looking to implement memory capabilities in their applications.

item.title: 7 Best Watches to Gift Mom This Mother’s Day
item.description: With Mother's Day 2026 approaching, watchmakers are promoting a range of watches suitable for gifting, focusing on practicality over luxury. This highlights trends in consumer preferences for functional gifts.

item.title: 5 AI Myths and Why We Must Move Past Them
item.description: The article discusses five prevalent myths about AI in education and argues for moving beyond outdated advice. This is significant as it challenges misconceptions that could hinder effective AI integration in teaching.

item.title: Marloo raises $16.7m for its AI assistant for financial advisers
item.description: Marloo has successfully raised $16.7 million to develop its AI assistant tailored for financial advisers, attracting notable clients like Pie Funds and Harbour Asset Management. This funding indicates growing interest in AI solutions for finance.

item.title: China’s decision to block the $2 billion Meta-Manus deal shows how far Washington and Beijing are drifting apart over AI
item.description: China's decision to block the $2 billion Meta-Manus deal underscores the increasing tensions between Washington and Beijing over control of strategic AI technologies. This reflects broader geopolitical concerns regarding technology transfer.

item.title: pysae-ai-tools 0.1.830
item.description: The pysae-ai-tools 0.1.830 release includes shared Python tools for enhancing Claude Code skills. This update is relevant for developers looking to improve their AI coding capabilities.

item.title: uipath-langchain 0.10.9
item.description: UiPath has released version 0.10.9 of its Python SDK, allowing developers to create and deploy LangGraph agents on the UiPath Cloud Platform. This update enhances the integration of AI capabilities into automation workflows.

item.title: Meta prepares to unwind its $2 billion Manus acquisition after China’s block
item.description: Meta is set to unwind its $2 billion acquisition of Manus after China's government blocked the deal. This decision highlights the challenges faced by foreign companies in acquiring Chinese tech firms.

item.title: langchain-deepkeep added to PyPI
item.description: The DeepKeep AI Firewall integration for LangChain has been added to the Python Package Index (PyPI), enhancing security features for developers using LangChain. This integration aims to improve the protection of AI applications.

item.title: Microsoft, OpenAI end exclusivity agreement
item.description: Microsoft and OpenAI have ended their exclusivity agreement, allowing OpenAI to partner with other cloud providers like Amazon. This shift could lead to increased competition and innovation in the AI space.

item.title: DeepSeek lifts capital by 50%, founder secures veto stake ahead of funding round
item.description: DeepSeek has increased its registered capital by 50% following an upgrade to its DeepSeek-V4 model. This ownership change indicates the company's growth and potential for future investments.

item.title: Show HN: Built a local-first way to make AI context reusable across tools
item.description: ProxVanta has been developed as a local-first solution to manage and reuse AI context across various tools, addressing the issue of scattered information. This innovation aims to streamline AI workflows.

item.title: chat2html 0.2.0rc1
item.description: chat2html version 0.2.0rc1 has been released, providing a tool for exporting AI coding-assistant conversations into shareable HTML format. This enhances the usability of AI interactions.

item.title: superharness 1.42.4
item.description: Superharness version 1.42.4 has been launched, offering a framework for multi-agent session handoffs in Claude Code and Codex CLI. This update aims to improve collaboration between AI agents.

item.title: How China block of AI deal could stop ‘Singapore-washing’
item.description: China's block of the Manus acquisition raises concerns about 'Singapore-washing,' where companies relocate to avoid regulatory scrutiny. This practice could impact future foreign investments in Chinese tech.

item.title: AI may be written in code, but it runs on electricity and India has structural advantage: Jeet Adani
item.description: Jeet Adani emphasizes that India's AI future relies on robust infrastructure and energy resources, with Visakhapatnam positioned as a key digital hub. This highlights India's strategic advantages in the AI landscape.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Max Rumors: Thinner Design, A20 Chip and Under-Display Face ID
item.description: Apple is reportedly redesigning the iPhone 18 Pro Max for a thinner profile and integrating the A20 chip and under-display Face ID, set for a September 2026 launch. This marks one of the most significant changes in years, potentially enhancing user experience and performance.

item.title: backend.ai-accelerator-cuda-open 26.4.4rc2
item.description: The Backend.AI Accelerator Plugin for CUDA has been released, enhancing backend capabilities for AI applications. This update is expected to improve performance for developers using CUDA.

item.title: composio-langchain 0.12.0
item.description: Composio has launched version 0.12.0, allowing users to utilize an array of tools with their Langchain agent. This update enhances the functionality of the Langchain framework.

item.title: composio-google-adk 0.12.0
item.description: Composio's version 0.12.0 now supports an array of tools for the Google AI Python Gemini model. This update aims to streamline integration and enhance user experience.

item.title: composio-google 0.12.0
item.description: Composio has released version 0.12.0, enabling users to access various tools with the Google AI Python Gemini model. This update is designed to improve user interaction with the model.

item.title: composio-gemini 0.12.0
item.description: The latest Composio version 0.12.0 provides an array of tools for the Gemini agent, enhancing its capabilities. This update is aimed at improving the efficiency of AI tasks.

item.title: Andhra CM Naidu lays foundation for $15 billion Google AI data centre in Vizag
item.description: Andhra Pradesh's Chief Minister has announced a $15 billion partnership with Google to build a cutting-edge AI data center in Visakhapatnam. This investment is expected to create numerous jobs and advance the region's tech landscape.

item.title: Is Google copying Samsung’s Now Brief and Now Nudge features?
item.description: Google is reportedly developing AI features similar to Samsung's Now Brief and Now Nudge, which were introduced for Galaxy phones. This move suggests a competitive landscape in AI-driven smartphone features.

item.title: defense-agent 0.1.5
item.description: The defense-agent version 0.1.5 has been released, featuring a multi-LLM agent framework with enhanced memory capabilities and tool support. This update aims to improve the functionality of AI agents.

item.title: Tesla Stock Climbs 0.63% to $378.67 as Robotaxi Optimism Builds
item.description: Tesla's stock rose by 0.63% to $378.67 amid growing optimism about its autonomous driving technology and the upcoming robotaxi launch. This reflects investor confidence despite ongoing delivery challenges.

item.title: ByteDance, Zhipu AI, and Alibaba named to TIME’s top 10 most influential AI companies of 2026
item.description: TIME has named ByteDance, Zhipu AI, and Alibaba among the top 10 most influential AI companies of 2026, emphasizing their broader impact on the industry. This recognition highlights companies that are shaping technology pathways rather than just focusing on model performance.

item.title: Introducing Qt Agentic Development Skills
item.description: Qt has released new agentic development skills aimed at enhancing productivity for developers working with Qt code. These skills are designed to streamline writing, documenting, and reviewing processes.

item.title: azpaddypy 1.0.6
item.description: The azpaddypy 1.0.6 update introduces an Azure cloud services SDK that includes various features such as storage, AI Foundry projects, and document intelligence. This release aims to enhance the capabilities of developers using Azure.

item.title: defense-agent 0.1.4
item.description: The defense-agent 0.1.4 update introduces a multi-LLM agent framework that includes memory support and tool integration. This framework aims to improve the functionality and efficiency of AI agents.

item.title: What changed in Microsoft GitHub AI pricing? #tech
item.description: GitHub is transitioning Copilot to a usage-based pricing model starting June 1, moving away from its previous subscription model. This change is expected to impact how developers budget for AI tools.

item.title: AI hype narrative reaches the public healthcare system in El Salvador
item.description: El Salvador's government claims that AI will transform its public healthcare system into one of the most advanced globally. This initiative reflects the growing trend of integrating AI into public services.

item.title: Why did China block Meta’s Manus acquisition? #tech
item.description: China has blocked Meta's acquisition of the AI startup Manus, citing regulatory concerns after months of scrutiny. This decision underscores the complexities of international tech acquisitions.

item.title: When It Comes To AI Adoption, Fear Is a Big Factor For Marketers
item.description: Marketers are feeling pressure to adapt to an AI-first world amid fears of job displacement caused by technology. This sentiment reflects broader anxieties within the workforce about AI's impact.

item.title: Adobe brings agentic AI to Firefly, enabling cross-app workflows with Photoshop, Premiere Pro, other tools
item.description: Adobe has launched public testing for its agentic Firefly AI assistant, which allows users to perform tasks across its creative suite using natural language. This innovation aims to enhance user experience and workflow efficiency.

item.title: China’s Politburo backs AI initiative, potential boost for Alibaba models
item.description: China’s Politburo has backed an AI initiative that could enhance Alibaba's competitive position in the tech industry. This state-level support may influence global tech dynamics amid ongoing U.S.-China tensions.
